name: Aurora Terminal
prompt: An original dark aurora workspace atmosphere: deep midnight navy and graphite space, flowing electric-violet and cyan aurora ribbons, subtle glassy geometric portal forms, sparse stardust, premium cinematic abstract digital art, futuristic and quietly inspiring. Create a production-ready panoramic 3:1 desktop theme background. Keep the entire left 38 percent calm and low-detail for native interface titles. Place the main visual focus on the right half. Pure background artwork only: no UI, no windows, no cards, no people, no characters, no text, no letters, no logos, and no watermark. The image must remain usable when center-cropped.
